info: NetEase Cloud Music Technology Co., Ltd.
Exclusive Solo EP — China & Global Distribution

sections.title: Production Partnership — Amy Allen
sections.lead: NetEase funds the full production budget and brings two-time Grammy “Songwriter of the Year” Amy Allen to co-produce the EP’s title track.

lines: Production Budget: USD 100,000, funded entirely by NetEase (inclusive of title-track production fee and studio costs).
Producer: Amy Allen — Grammy Award Winner, Songwriter of the Year 2025 & 2026.
EP Scope: minimum 4 songs; the title track is co-produced with Amy Allen, subject to her availability and scheduling.

blocks.text: Amy Allen is one of the defining songwriting forces of modern pop. A two-time Grammy winner for Songwriter of the Year (Non-Classical) — the most prestigious individual songwriting honor in the industry — she has co-written some of the most commercially and critically successful songs of the past decade, spanning indie pop, K-pop, and mainstream global hits. Her style is known for emotional precision, melodic inevitability, and cross-cultural appeal.

cells: 2nd consecutive win; nominated for Song of the Year for “APT.” and “Manchild”
First woman ever to win the category; first back-to-back winner in its history
Co-writer on Harry Styles’ Harry’s House

blocks.text: Selected Hits — The Amy Allen Catalog

cells: K-pop / global pop crossover; Grammy SOTY nominee
ROSÉ’s debut solo hit — K-pop solo precedent

blocks.text: Allen’s work with ROSÉ on “On the Ground” is proof of concept: she understands how to craft a K-pop solo breakout that resonates globally without compromising the artist’s identity. For NetEase, securing her involvement signals that this EP is built to compete at the highest global level.

items: Title track co-written and produced by Amy Allen.
USD 100,000 production budget funded entirely by NetEase.
Studio sessions scheduled in coordination with the Artist’s team.
Creative direction prioritizes [ARTIST]’s artistic identity and international audience.
NetEase facilitates introductions and scheduling with Amy Allen’s management.

sections.title: Marketing & Promotion
sections.lead: Beyond production, NetEase commits its marketing platform — anchored by a nationwide out-of-home billboard campaign — to launch the EP at scale across China.

lines: Out-of-home billboards across up to 30 major Chinese cities — including Beijing, Shanghai, and Guangzhou.
Per-billboard media value: approximately RMB 150,000 (≈ USD 20,000).
On top of NetEase Cloud Music’s own in-app promotion — editorial features, playlisting, and homepage placement.

blocks.text: NetEase can deploy out-of-home (OOH) billboard advertising across up to 30 major Chinese cities, led by the three top-tier markets — Beijing, Shanghai, and Guangzhou — and extending into further first- and second-tier cities. Each flagship billboard placement carries an indicative media value of approximately RMB 150,000 (≈ USD 20,000), giving the EP high-visibility physical presence in the markets that matter most for a China-first launch.

cells: Up to 30 major cities (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, +)

blocks.text: Billboard figures are indicative media values and depend on final city selection, placement, and campaign timing, to be confirmed in the marketing plan. The 30-city total assumes one flagship billboard per city.

rows: Hangzhou NetEase Cloud Music Technology Co., Ltd.
5 years from release date, with 2-year right of first renewal
Owned by NetEase in Mainland China only; outside China, revenue-share applies (no ownership transfer)
Nationwide billboard campaign (up to 30 cities) + NetEase in-app promotion — see Section 02

sections.title: Financial Structure — Two Options
sections.lead: Choose one structure. Both are sound; the better fit depends on how the EP is expected to perform.

left.label: Option A — Advance Structure
bullets: Advance of USD 250,000, recoupable from royalties.
NetEase retains royalties until the advance is recouped.
If royalties never recoup, NetEase absorbs the shortfall — the advance is never repaid.

right.label: Option B — Minimum Guarantee
bullets: Artist earns royalties from the first stream/sale; the MG is not deducted.
A guaranteed floor regardless of performance.

sections.title: Revenue Share
sections.lead: Operating costs come off the top first; the remainder is split 50/50. The deduction differs by market and format.

rows.band: Global — net of platform operations costs

cells: Digital Album Sales (net of 20% operations cost)
Physical Album Sales (net of 30% operations cost)

rows.band: Global — net of platform operations costs

cells: Digital Album Sales (net of 20% operations cost)
Physical Album Sales (net of 30% operations cost)

blocks.text: “Operations cost” in China is a flat 20% (30% for physical albums). “Platform operations costs” on global streaming and sync are the actual distribution and DSP fees charged by third-party platforms, deducted before the split. The split is uniform within each option — 50/50 under Option A, 40/60 under Option B.

rows: 5 years from China release date, plus a 2-year right of first renewal; no competing platforms (Tencent Music, QQ, Kugou, Kuwo) without prior written consent.
NetEase owns the master in Mainland China only. Outside China there is no ownership transfer; revenue-share applies (Section 05).
Deducted before the revenue split (Section 05): China a flat 20% (physical albums 30%); global streaming and sync net of actual platform/distributor fees.
Physical album production must include collectible photo cards (one or more per copy), produced as part of the physical album manufacturing.
USD 100,000 funded by NetEase; inclusive of Amy Allen’s title-track fee and studio costs.
Governed by the laws of the People’s Republic of China; disputes resolved by arbitration seated in China.

cells: Review proposal and select preferred deal structure (Option A or B)
Introductory call / meeting with NetEase Business Team

footerNote: This proposal is strictly confidential and intended solely for the named recipient. All figures are indicative and subject to final negotiation and legal documentation.
